reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the least noisy and most reusable memory/world-model sub-lineages from the parent batch.
They preserve architecture and packaging tensions without overcommitting to the late consciousness and deployment branches.
They stay fully source-linked to existing intake artifacts without requiring a fresh raw-doc pass.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: Hardware, Hume, and Klein branches are substantial expansions layered onto the earlier memory problem.
The parent file's completion rhetoric is not enough to treat those branches as cleaner reusable doctrine.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after prior required control-surface reads.
Kept the pass single-parent and bounded rather than starting a new raw-source family.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this bounded holodeck reduction pass.
